evidence_direction_note: Design-inconclusive: uncommitted_steps=0 throughout eval. Agent trained to running_variance ~7.5e-5 which is below commit_threshold, permanently locking in committed mode. The experiment never sampled uncommitted state -- criteria C1/C2/C3 are untestable. This is a substrate design limitation, not a signal about MECH-029. Fix direction: eval during training (pre-convergence) or artificially reset running_variance above threshold to force mode transitions. Architectural note: wanting/liking/go-no-go gating additions and breath-beat cyclical markers (see MECH-026 breath_beat claims) may provide natural uncommitted-mode windows in future substrate.
